name: Banner
description: Promotional banner in one of four standard ad sizes. Add the variant name as a second class on the block.

variants.name: Leader Board
variants.description: Full-width horizontal strip, 728 × 90 px. Image left, description + CTA right.

variants.name: Medium Rectangle
variants.description: Compact card, 300 × 250 px. Image top, description + CTA below. Does not span full width.

variants.name: Large Rectangle
variants.description: Full-width horizontal banner, ~970 × 250 px. Taller than the Leader Board.

variants.name: Ribbon
variants.description: Thin full-width strip, ~48 px tall. Use for offers, voucher codes, or cookie notices.

fields.name: Body
fields.description: Heading, description text, and CTA link.
